title: In just two and a half months, through options trading, I achieved a return of up to 279% on this small account. I am deeply grateful to the market and to the right people
author: japicbens
selftext:
This account initially entered the market with a capital of $3,500. Later, when the balance exceeded $10,000, I added another $900; however, since this additional contribution was relatively small in proportion, I do not factor it into the calculation. In reality, the true return on investment has reached 350%

The plan for this account is to aim for an average growth of 100% per month meaning, hopefully, a twelvefold return by the end of this year

Within our trading circle, we engage in daily discussions covering various aspects of the stock market, sharing analyses of our profits and losses, as well as our trading strategies and underlying logic. We also discuss risk management and other pertinent information all of which has proven immensely helpful to me. Thanks to this support, I am now optimistic that I will be able to pay off my outstanding debts this year

If you are interested in joining our discussions whether to talk about risk management, trading strategies, or simply to share your own insights please feel free to send me a private message or leave a comment below. I will send you an invitation as soon as I see your message

I wish everyone rational trading and hope that you all generate even greater wealth!

comments.author: Rpark444
comments.body: Sound like BS. How do we know this is ur account?

replies.author: Six2guy
replies.body: 23d old account! I say you're right!

comments.author: Maui4x
comments.body:
If you make 100% a month, you’d make more than a _thousand_fold in 10 months- not merely "a twelvefold return.” The magic of compounding.

Good luck with that: Of course these results are not typical, so let’s just say I’d be skeptical and do my due diligence if I were to think about considering the contemplation of getting involved with anything like this.

If it sounds too good to be true yada yada

comments.author: chait7
comments.body: Good. Now try not losing it.
